---
title: "Miss Jupp"
---

## Miss Jupp

### Description

compiler of [[cmybook:355]<i>The Daisy Chain Birthday Book</i>]

### Biography

She was also presumably editor or author of the other works appearing under the name ‘Eadgyth’, which include a contribution to the Christmas number of <i>MP</i> (1890).  Perhaps she was the Miss E. Jupp who was paid £3 on 20 June 1872.  Perhaps Edith Margaret Jupp (b. 1847/8), daughter of Edward Basil Jupp (1812-1877), solicitor and antiquary of Greenwich. [1871 census, CMY bank account, ODNB E.B.Jupp]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 12th 1884 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
